_note: Curated from pylint-odoo v3.x for Odoo v13. v13: OWL framework introduced (components/hooks), new spreadsheet module, `active_test` context key, `_auto` flag usage. ESLint from odoo/addons/web/static/src/.eslintrc.

rules.message: Manifest file is missing required key `name`.
Manifest file is missing required key `version`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `author`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `license`.
New model class is missing `_name` attribute.
rules.fix_template: Add `_name = 'module.model'` as the first class attribute.

rules.message: `_inherit` without `_name` creates extension — ensure this is intentional.
ir.model.access entry missing from security CSV — model may be inaccessible.
XML id reference does not match any declared id in the module or its dependencies.
Translation string uses positional `%s` formatting — use named `%(name)s`.
File declared in manifest `data` list does not exist.
SQL injection risk: `cr.execute` called with string interpolation.
Built-in dynamic expression interpreter used with external input — use `odoo.tools.safe_eval` instead.
Hardcoded database ID used — use `env.ref()` instead.
`_rec_name` field not present in model fields.
`create()` override does not call `super()` — record will not be created.
`unlink()` override does not call `super()` — records will not be deleted from DB.
QWeb report template missing `t-name` attribute.
OWL component class not registered via `registry` — component will not be accessible.
Unexpected `var`. Use `let` or `const` instead.
Unexpected `console` statement in production JS.
Reference to undeclared variable.
OWL template references a component not imported in this JS file.
